companyDescription: Innovative platform for creating interactive real estate plans. We simplify the sales process and increase conversion.
crmIntegrationDesc: Automatic transfer of leads and apartment data to AmoCRM, Bitrix24, HubSpot and other CRM systems. No lost applications — all clients are immediately in your funnel.
dataImportDesc: Upload apartment statuses and prices from Excel, CSV or Google Sheets. All data will automatically sync to the system.
description: Professional platform for creating and managing interactive real estate floor plans. Upload plans, configure apartments, and embed widgets on your website.
embeddableWidgetDesc: Embed interactive plans on your website with simple HTML code
excelIntegrationDesc: Import apartment data from Excel files and synchronize information
interactiveEditingDesc: Create and edit apartment polygons directly in the browser with a convenient editor
interactivePlansDesc: Gridix helps create clear and convenient real estate plans: mark apartment statuses, connect CRM integrations and share plans with one line of code. Everything is simple, fast and without unnecessary costs.
interactivePlansTitle: Interactive chessboard and plans for developers and real estate agencies
multiProjectDesc: Manage multiple real estate projects in one admin panel
planUploadDesc: Upload building plan images and create interactive apartment maps
readyToStartDesc: Create your first interactive real estate plan today
sellFromAnywhere: SELL FROM ANYWHERE IN THE WORLD
statusManagementDesc: Track apartment statuses: available, reserved, sold
subtitle: with ease
